Who We Are

Built on Honesty,
Integrity & Loyalty

Ridgewood Trading (PTY) LTD is a dynamic engineering and construction company based in Pietermaritzburg, KwaZulu-Natal. Founded in 2020, we are driven by a passion for precision and a commitment to exceeding the expectations of every client we serve.

Under the leadership of Director Brent Emmanuel, Ridgewood Trading delivers world-class engineering solutions across a broad spectrum of industries. Our foundation rests on three pillars: technical excellence, community empowerment, and unwavering integrity.

"We endeavour to empower people to improve themselves both in and out of the workplace."

We are proud to hold a Level 1 B-BBEE status, reflecting our commitment to transformation and equal opportunity across the South African engineering sector.

What We Do

Our Core Services

We deliver world-class engineering solutions across a comprehensive range of disciplines — from precision machining to large-scale construction management — all under one roof.

01
Precision & General Engineering

High-tolerance machining and general engineering solutions crafted to exact specifications for demanding industrial applications.

02
Boiler Making

Expert boilermaking services including fabrication, repair and installation of pressure vessels and industrial equipment.

03
Pipe Fitting

Professional pipe fitting for industrial, commercial and infrastructure projects, designed for durability and long-term safety.

04
Mechanical Fitting & Site Work

On-site mechanical fitting expertise ensuring correct installation, alignment and commissioning of all mechanical systems.

05
General Arrangement Drawings

Precise technical drawings and conceptual design services supporting feasibility studies and full project management.

06
Fabrication & Construction

Structural fabrication and full-cycle construction management from concept design through to completion and handover.

Our Work

Project Gallery

Our Purpose

Vision & Mission

Our Vision

World-Class
Recognition

We aim to manufacture products that are recognised worldwide and are of the best quality. To service, maintain and satisfy all customers proficiently — ultimately growing the business and creating local opportunity and growth within our community.

Our Mission

Manufacture.
Repair. Serve.

Our mission is to manufacture, repair and offer services at worldwide standards — providing customers with fast, efficient delivery of high-quality products at affordable prices. We empower our people and build lasting partnerships grounded in honesty, integrity, and loyalty.
